title: Secure steward adoption and at least 1 documented downstream reuse
context: The 'delivered, not merged' bar for this project requires a named steward to formally adopt, host, or cite the corpus, and at least one concrete downstream reuse to be documented. Candidate stewards are a Wikimedia chapter, a public library or geographic names authority, a language-revitalisation organisation, or a broadcaster pronunciation unit. A downstream reuse could be a TTS/screen-reader integration, a classroom or broadcast pronunciation reference, a Wikimedia integration, or a navigation/mapping integration. Depends on place-name-pronunciation-partner-002.
objective: Secure a formal adoption, hosting, or citation commitment from at least 1 named steward organisation, and document at least 1 concrete downstream reuse of the corpus (a TTS/screen-reader/navigation/classroom/Wikimedia integration or equivalent).
acceptanceCriteria: At least 1 named steward organisation (library, Wikimedia chapter, broadcaster unit, or revival org) formally commits to adopt, host, or cite the corpus; the commitment is documented in writing.

At least 1 concrete downstream reuse is documented with: the reusing org/individual, the nature of the reuse (TTS/screen-reader/navigation/classroom/Wikimedia/other), the date, and a public link or reference.
The steward commitment and reuse documentation are committed as STEWARD-ADOPTION.md.
verifiedNeed is updated to true on corpus tasks once the steward commitment is received (requires a separate PR updating affected task files).
Maintainer reviews and approves STEWARD-ADOPTION.md before the task is marked done.
output: STEWARD-ADOPTION.md committed via PR documenting the named steward commitment and at least 1 documented downstream reuse.
